texts.full_text: irrational number is not normal1234567890, then every possible sequence of numerals appears in its infinite decimal expansion. And so if the universe could be considered infinitely "not-normal," it would indeed contain everything imaginable—an endless repetition and variation on all themes conceivable by human (and perhaps non-human) minds. Imagine an infinity where planet-sized enterprises fail to thrive; carpet-cleaning operations, for instance, might falter due to inefficiency or lack of customers. Entire planets could then be devoted solely to those who sold machines used in these failing businesses—machines that were themselves obsolete before they even left the factory floor because no one needed them. These scenarios branch out into ever more convoluted chains: galaxies full of professionals catering indirectly and tangentially, such as psychiatrists for parking meter attendants ticketing veterinarians treating sick dogs belonging to those few remaining customers from failing carpet-cleaning ventures. The absurdity escalates until it reaches a darkly humorous endpoint ("ad suicidem"), where the very concept becomes an exercise in futility within its own infinite expanse, mocking our attempts at order and purpose amidst boundless chaos1234567890 This writeup has been cooled by: robwicksX 1 C! (idea) by vagary Wed Dec 26 2001 at 22:48:39 SmokeyBarnable's assertion can be best understood as implicitly using the following analogy: If an irrational number is not normal1, then every possible sequence of numerals appears in its infinite decimal expansion. texts.full_text: Champion » Forum » World of Warcraft » PvP » What if all cc including stuns would break on any dmg taken.... Thread: What if all cc including stuns would break on any dmg taken.... Thread Tools Show Printable Version Email this Page… Page 2 of 2 First 12 Jump to page: 01:28 AM #21 Constraint View Profile View Forum Posts Private Message View Started Threads Brewmaster Join Date Jan 2011 Location Auckland, New Zealand Posts 1,469 I certainly think at the very least there should be a percentage-based threshold for ALL ccs breaking. I think fear should break extremely early, roots a little stuns a little etc. But the RNG of going from 70-10% in a fear without it even pretending to break while running...is just not fun. It would also punish players for actually positioning themselves properly, as they would risk breaking their fear by even a tiny bit of dam
